title: Active listening - a positive personality factor
author: Priya
content:
We have a wide variety of information flowing through us, which may or may not be that meaningful for us to keep a note on. But sometimes it becomes a near miss for us that some important piece of information going slipped away as we r not keen on to hear on it patiently. Becoming an active listener is 1 of the important personality traits as it helps us to keep a close tab on our potential of being an effective communicator. What we hear,  we pass on that information to others, and it forms a chain of close network of people for knowledge sharing and in keeping us updated with the current ongoing things happening in and across the country. And to be vocal about something, we need information on it to extend our conversation, convert our chain of thoughts into a 2 way communication. And 1 can't be an effective communicator of words if you're not an active listener. 


How listening improves our cerebral functioning 


-> Our body, after working tirelessly, may cause pain, muscle cramps, illnesses, or put us in a vegetative state due to restlessness, but the mind has no restive peace. It remains active whether our body is resting or in motion. The brain keeps snapshots of our daily occurrences of activities, and having dreams r a reflection of it. Getting mental stress, anxiety, fatigue r signs of mental exhaustion. and it shows our brain may work in every state of the body, but active working happens only for a period of time when we r conscious enough to decisively act on a situation. Having good listening skills directly signals our brain to capture those events and thoughts. Whatever we see or hear, our brain develops a hypothesis of it to make things become more revealing for us to understand it deeply. Things we listen have high retention period in our brain than the things we read on paper. Our rationale to understand something deeply directly updates our memory when it is listen than when it is read from a piece of writing and it is because the filtered information we got through hearing get easily absorbed by the brain than some written text which requires extra gushing up for brain to imbibe it.And it's a proven fact that knowledge acquired through hearing is more comprehensible and doesn't require extra juggling up by brain to be noticed.. 


 What a good active listening can result in -> 

When we hear something with interest , our brain easily capture them and sync it with our memory .Our mind and body has a very symbiotic relationship . What mind catches our body react to it. Having a good communication skill is a sign of active listening and it renders in our work and play , in our daily activities in varied ways -

• Keeping our mind active and listening passionately will sharpen our memory , improve our thinking and imaginative power .

• Active listening will set an upstream path for your career and make u more knowledge worthy to take good decision making choices. A deep thinking , predictive analysis and regression from sequence of events happens when we trace our memory deeper for a resulting outcome for a good career building path . And it results from your listening ability messaging brain , feeding it with data making it run faster.


 • listening with open ears will also help u taking open discussion and will improve your communication skills by enhancing your knowledge base and making you sound more natural and intuitive. Active listening directly take on our communication and we become visceral to speaking like a native born speaker.

 • With strong listening skills will make you more debatable and argumentative in winning over cited facts and figures. The more we listen, the more our brain creates flashes of those thoughts and events into our memory and widens our lexicon with new words and ideas. Will improve our thinking that impinges upon bringing new set of thoughts and ideas in our speaking.

 • Keeping your mind active will ward off negative thoughts overpowering u, and u would feel more positive refreshing. As an idle mind is the devil's workshop. Moving your mind elsewhere in a destructive manner will create a void of negative energy and would turn u into a blockhead, destroy your cognitive power, reasonings, thinking ability.

 • Active listening will make u mentally active and bodily present by keeping u awake and idleness go away with your brain messaging body to to be alert and active in an awakening position. Because a healthy mind resides in a healthy body.


We become who we surround ourself with. Speaking fluently requires us to be in such surrounding where our tongue can catch our mind. An active listening outcome in perfection with our good communication skill only and only when we r in a zone of active hearing. Speaking confidently is not an innate quality a person born with. We in real sense r an imitation of 1000s of speaker we listen to. The adaptation in our tone, language and dialect comes from the number of speakers we r surrounded with . A child learn to speak by hearing . We excel in our exams through reported speech - writing by our teacher. Which is a clear drive through that 1 can hone their speaking skill with good listening ability and can use their listening skills to influence others with their art of speaking.
An active listening outshines our personality by slowly or steadily working on improving our quality of speech.Rome was not built in a day . Having an improved communication is a repetitive tasks of active hearing and a parallel functioning of brain to transform us in a polished version of ourselves .
